description: Create a custom Wireshark Configuration Profile named 'DNS_Ops' optimized for DNS troubleshooting. The profile must exclude the default 'Length' column and include new columns titled 'TransID' (field: dns.id) and 'Query' (field: dns.qry.name). Additionally, configure a coloring rule named 'DNS_Fail' with the filter 'dns.flags.rcode != 0' and a red background. Verify the configuration using the loaded dns.cap file and save a screenshot of the packet list showing the new columns and coloring to /home/ga/Documents/dns_ops_view.png. Ensure the 'DNS_Ops' profile is active upon completion.
